description: Response for batch operations that had some failures
name: BatchPortalFlagStateResponseWithErrors

status.description: The overall status of the batch operation

results.description: List of portal flag states that were successfully affected

items.description: Represents the flag state override for a specific portal (account)

appId.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot application

flagName.description: The name of the feature flag

portalId.description: The unique identifier for the HubSpot portal (account)

flagState.description: The state of a feature flag

errors.description: List of errors that occurred during the batch operation

items.description: Represents an error that occurred for a specific item in a batch operation

startedAt.description: Timestamp when the batch operation started

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the batch operation completed
